title: prestonia premontana
intro: Prestonia premontana, also known as "Milk of the Tiger" or "Tiger's Milk", is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating fever, coughs, and digestive problems. Prestonia premontana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
